# Matrix Minds

> AI, machine learning, data science and ethical-hacking solutions worldwide, founded by S. Hareedh.

Matrix Minds is a global technology studio specializing in custom AI/ML
solutions, cybersecurity & penetration testing, data analytics, and
bespoke software. Contact: matrixmindsha@gmail.com / +91 9629310410.

- [Home](/): Overview of Matrix Minds services, founder, projects, store, and contact.
